message:
chore(fuzz): sync fuzz/Cargo.lock for new sse fuzz target and resolved transitive deps

Lockfile counterpart to commit d25c9216 (test(fcp-streaming): add libfuzzer
target for SSE event-stream parser). The fuzz workspace's Cargo.lock had not
yet been regenerated to reflect:

- the new fcp-streaming path-dep entry registered in fuzz/Cargo.toml,
- transitive resolution updates: fcp-* crates pulled in x509-parser and a
  fresh tracing edge through one of the helper crates, both already present
  in workspace manifests but not yet materialized in the fuzz lockfile.

Captures the deterministic resolve so fuzz workers do not have to re-resolve
on every clean build and the reproducer corpus stays pinned to the exact
graph that produced any future crash.

No source or manifest changes — pure lockfile materialization.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1353,6 +1353,7 @@ dependencies = [
  "tracing",
